summary: Tested Phase 3A & 3B Risk Management APIs. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Circuit breakers (7 types), TQS-based position sizing, health monitoring, and dynamic thresholds all working correctly. Position sizing verified: entry=$150, stop=$147, account=$100k, TQS=75 gives 66 shares with 1.36x multiplier as expected.

circuit_breaker_status.details: Returns all 7 breaker types (daily_loss_dollar, daily_loss_percent, consecutive_losses, trade_frequency, drawdown, tilt_detection, time_restriction) with trading metrics (daily_pnl, daily_high_pnl, consecutive_losses, trades_this_hour).

circuit_breaker_configs.details: Returns configs for all 7 breakers with correct defaults: daily_loss_dollar=-$500, daily_loss_percent=-2%, consecutive_losses=3, trade_frequency=10/hr, drawdown=-5%.

circuit_breaker_configure.details: Successfully updates circuit breaker config (tested with consecutive_losses), persists changes.

trading_permission_check.details: Returns trading permission with allowed status, max_size_multiplier, triggered_breakers, warnings, requires_override. Low TQS (<50) adds warning, very low TQS (<35) caps size to 50%.

position_sizing_config.details: Returns sizing config with mode=tqs_scaled, TQS scaling params (min_score=35, base_score=50, max_score=85, min_multiplier=0.25, max_multiplier=1.5).

position_sizing_calculate.details: Calculates position size with TQS multiplier scaling. Test case: entry=$150, stop=$147, account=$100k, TQS=75 → 66 shares with 1.36x multiplier (matches expected).

position_sizing_table.details: Returns scaling table for different TQS scores: 35→0.25x, 50→1.0x, 65→1.21x, 75→1.36x, 85→1.5x.

threshold_summary.details: Returns base thresholds (min_tqs_score=50, min_win_rate=0.45, min_tape_score=4, min_expected_value=0.1), regime adjustments, time adjustments, VIX adjustments.

threshold_calculate.details: Calculates dynamic thresholds based on context. Tested: volatile market + high VIX (35) + 2 consecutive losses raises min_tqs_score from 50 to 74.

threshold_check_trade.details: Checks trade against dynamic thresholds. Returns passes boolean, thresholds_checked, failures, warnings, context_used.

health_quick_status.details: Returns quick status with can_trade, healthy_count, degraded_count, unhealthy_count, total_components (10 components monitored).

health_report.details: Returns full health report with overall_status, components (alpaca, ib_gateway, mongodb, ollama, etc.), data_quality, alerts, recommendations.

tqs_multiplier_scaling.details: Verified TQS multiplier math: TQS 35→0.25x (min), TQS 50→1.0x (base), TQS 85→1.5x (max). Linear interpolation between scores works correctly.

dynamic_threshold_adjustments.details: Thresholds adjust based on: market regime (+8 for volatile), VIX level (+10 for 30-40 range), consecutive losses (+3 per loss), recent performance (+5 for cold streak, -3 for hot streak).

critical_code_review_comments: Circuit breaker service implements 7 breaker types correctly with configurable thresholds and actions
Position sizer correctly implements TQS multiplier scaling with linear interpolation (0.25x at TQS 35 to 1.5x at TQS 85)
Dynamic thresholds service properly adjusts min_tqs_score based on market regime, VIX level, and trader performance
Health monitor tracks 10 components (alpaca, ib_gateway, mongodb, ollama, etc.) with graceful degradation
All services use singleton pattern with proper dependency injection via set_services()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3A (Circuit Breakers, Position Sizing, Health Monitoring) and Phase 3B (Dynamic Thresholds) are complete. All risk management APIs working at /api/risk/*. Key formula verified: TQS 75 with entry=$150, stop=$147, account=$100k gives 66 shares with 1.36x multiplier. Health monitor shows IB Gateway and Ollama as unhealthy (expected in cloud environment).
health_note: Health monitor shows 4 healthy, 4 degraded, 2 unhealthy components. IB Gateway and Ollama unhealthy is expected in cloud environment. Critical components (alpaca, mongodb, scanner, circuit_breakers) are healthy.
